content: Phase 0: POC — atomic Mongo sequence generator + object storage upload/signed URL
Phase 1: Scaffold + Auth + Tenant + Permissions + Sequence service
Design agent: define light SaaS visual system
Phase 5: Work Orders multi per order (backend + frontend)
Phase 6: Invoices one per order + Payments (backend + frontend)
Phase 8: SendGrid email service + 5 templates + email log (fails gracefully)
End-to-end testing via testing_agent_v3 — 100% backend, all frontend flows verified
Post-MVP: Dev Auth Bypass (AUTH_DEV_BYPASS=true) with visible warning banner
